classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示零部件前视结构轮廓、安装孔和连接器外形位置，并标注可见尺寸'44'、'31.70'、'13.70'、'5'、'Ø63'等，属于机械结构尺寸图；未出现针脚功能、线色或接线定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read '?63'; corrected to diameter symbol Φ63 based on visible diameter callout.
OCR read only '4'; corrected to '44' because the visible callout is 44 and the source box covers the height dimension text.

dimension_records.reason: Visible horizontal dimension at upper right of the front view; retained as an independent local feature dimension.
Left-side vertical dimension spans the outer width of the upper mounting/shaft interface area in the front view.
Vertical dimension callout adjacent to the internal feature; retained as a direct mounting interface dimension.
Vertical dimension callout between the inner feature boundaries; retained as a direct slot/spacing dimension.
Right-side vertical diameter callout marks the circular/overall body envelope as Φ63.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting/interface dimensions include 44 mm, 31.70 mm, and 13.70 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main visible envelope diameter is Φ63; local end width is 5 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector is visible but no connector text callout is available from OCR in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: One low-confidence OCR fragment was not used because it appears to be noise or partial line recognition.

unresolved_items.reason: Low-confidence isolated OCR fragment near dimension/structure lines; not reliably a visible engineering callout.
Overlaps the Φ63 dimension area and appears to be a duplicate/fragment from the diameter callout rather than an independent label.
